name: Recce
overview: Set in the backdrop of Anantapur, in 1993,  A dual murder takes place, setting off a series of unforeseen consequences and twists after a cop named Lenin embarks on an investigation.

trailers.title: Recce | Official Trailer | A ZEE5 Original | Sriram | Siva Balaji | Premiering June 17 On ZEE5
